summary: Iteration 180 testing complete: Resonance Practice, Mantra of the Day, Rapid City GPS Hotspots. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: Dashboard shows 'Mantra of the Day' widget with italic mantra text and category label, Trade Circle has 'Resonance' tab with 5 practice cards showing element icons, dust ranges, XP, and min durations. All existing tabs (Browse, Gates, Broker, Forge, Content) still working.
critical_code_review_comments: resonance.py implements 5 practice types with correct elements: meditation(water), breathing(air), grounding(earth), visualization(fire), mantra(ether)
Min durations correctly set: meditation=30s, breathing=20s, grounding=45s, visualization=60s, mantra=90s
5 Rapid City hotspots added: Memorial Park Spring, Skyline Drive Overlook, Storybook Island Grove, Dinosaur Park Summit, Canyon Lake Reflection
MantraOfTheDay.js properly fetches from /api/mantras and caches in localStorage
ResonancePractice.js includes PracticeCard and ResonanceTimer components with quality mini-game
TradeCircle.js includes Resonance tab in TABS array with proper routing to ResonancePractice component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 180 Resonance Practice, Mantra of the Day, Rapid City Hotspots all working. Resonance Practice has 5 types (meditation/water, breathing/air, grounding/earth, visualization/fire, mantra/ether) with min durations (30s/20s/45s/60s/90s). Daily limit is 10 sessions. Test user has completed 2 meditation sessions (streak=1, 22 dust earned). Rapid City has 5 hotspots at coordinates: Memorial Park (44.0752,-103.231), Skyline Drive (44.0614,-103.257), Storybook Island (44.0735,-103.242), Dinosaur Park (44.0745,-103.2515), Canyon Lake (44.069,-103.266). Collect radius is 50m. Static sites total is 13 (8 global + 5 Rapid City).

backend_apis.GET /api/resonance/practices: Returns 5 practice types with dust_range, xp, element, min_duration_seconds, stats, consciousness_level, max_daily_sessions, remaining_today
backend_apis.POST /api/resonance/complete (valid): Returns completed=true, rewards (dust, xp), streak info, level_multiplier
backend_apis.GET /api/hotspots/nearby (Rapid City): Returns Rapid City hotspots including Memorial Park Spring
backend_apis.GET /api/hotspots/static-sites: Returns 13 total sites (8 global + 5 Rapid City)
backend_apis.GET /api/mantras: Returns mantras with text, category for dashboard widget

frontend_dashboard.mantra_text: Italic text showing daily mantra (e.g., 'Om Namah Shivaya — I bow to the divine within')

frontend_trade_circle.meditation_card: 5-15 DUST, Min 30s, +10 XP, water element icon
frontend_trade_circle.breathing_card: 4-10 DUST, Min 20s, +8 XP, air element icon
frontend_trade_circle.grounding_card: 6-21 DUST, Min 45s, +12 XP, earth element icon
frontend_trade_circle.visualization_card: 8-32 DUST, Min 60s, +15 XP, fire element icon
frontend_trade_circle.mantra_card: 10-50 DUST, Min 90s, +20 XP, ether element icon
frontend_trade_circle.stats_display: Shows streak, dust earned, sessions, today remaining
frontend_trade_circle.how_it_works: Explains Duration, Quality, Streak, Consciousness mechanics
